mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(public_id, login_id, password, nickname, friend_code) VALUES(#{publicId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{friendCode})
mapper.select:
SELECT public_id, nickname, friend_code, profile_img FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND user_id != #{userId}
AND ( nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') OR friend_code LIKE CONCAT('%', UPPER(#{searchWord}), '%') ) LIMIT 20
mapper.update: update user set password = #{encodedNewPassword} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select login_id from users where user_id = #{userId};
